mapper.select: select r.id as "receiptId", r.is_read as "isRead", r.read_at as "readAt", n.id as "notificationId", n.title, n.content, n.category, n.sender_id as "senderId", n.priority, n.channel, n.create_time as "createTime" from agent_notification_receipt r join agent_notification n on n.id = r.notification_id and n.status = 1 where r.recipient_id = #{userId} and r.is_deleted = 0 and r.status = 1 order by n.create_time desc
